name: S2 Sim & Sports Lounge
about: S2 Sim & Sports Lounge is a golf simulator venue offering a combination of technology and social atmosphere. The venue features multiple bays equipped with high-end simulation technology for serious golf practice and play. It provides a relaxed environment suitable for individuals, groups, and casual players looking to enjoy golf with food and drink options.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium simulation technology for accurate and immersive play
Social atmosphere with food and drink options
Suitable for both practice and casual play sessions

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor with advanced ball tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but the venue also offers club rentals for those who don't have their own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted, as the venue offers a full kitchen and bar service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: An 18-hole round typically takes about 2-3 hours depending on the number of players in your bay.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue welcomes families, though specific kid-friendly amenities are not detailed on their website.
